hero.subtitle: Handcrafted journeys through ancient kingdoms, misty tea country, leopard trails and warm Indian Ocean shores — designed in Colombo by people who know the island by heart.

footer.blurb: Handcrafted private journeys across Sri Lanka, designed in Colombo and remembered long after the flight home.

destinations.heading: Cinematic chapters of Sri Lanka.
destinations.lead: From ancient rock fortresses to pristine beaches – discover why Sri Lanka is called the pearl of the Indian Ocean.

experience.heading: What changes when the island is planned around you.
experience.lead: Beyond Borders combines local planning, private movement and personal assistance so every day feels held, but never overmanaged.
experience.cardText: Partner hotels, private transfers and attentive on-trip support.

steps.title: Tailor-made itineraries
steps.desc: No fixed routes. Every journey is drawn around your pace, taste and curiosity.

steps.title: Local expertise
steps.desc: Planned in Colombo by people who know the island's stories, roads and quiet details first-hand.

steps.title: 24/7 dedicated assistant
steps.desc: One person, always reachable, from the moment you land until you fly home.

steps.title: Seamless transfers
steps.desc: Private, air-conditioned travel door to door, with airport pickup included, always.

cta.heading: Begin Your Private Journey
cta.sub: Tell us where your heart wants to go. We'll shape the rest with care.

toursPage.heroLead: Curated Sri Lanka journeys, tailored around your pace and preferences.
toursPage.heading: Choose the structure, then let us shape the details.
toursPage.lead: Each journey begins with a carefully crafted framework, then evolves around your interests, travel style and preferred pace.
toursPage.ctaText: Use the tour package that feels closest, then share your dates, comfort level and must-see places.

destinationsPage.heroLead: A full island grid of ancient capitals, tea country, coastal forts, national parks, surf beaches and city arrivals.
destinationsPage.heading: Every chapter can stand alone, or become part of one held route.
destinationsPage.lead: Use these destination pages as building blocks. Beyond Borders will connect the timing, transfers and stays into a private journey that feels seamless.
destinationsPage.ctaText: Tell us your travel dates and style, and we will suggest the island rhythm that makes the most sense.

toursList.customText: Tell us your dates, group size and the places you can't miss, and our planners will craft a fully custom journey and quote just for you.

notFound.heading: This route isn't on our map.
notFound.lead: The page you were looking for has moved, changed, or never existed. Let's get you back to planning your journey through Sri Lanka.

auth.registerSummary: Register to reserve a journey. Accounts are reviewed by our team before booking.
auth.loginSummary: Sign in to reserve a journey and manage your bookings.
auth.verifiedSummary: Your account is verified. Reserve a journey and pay securely online.
auth.unverifiedSummary: Your account is awaiting verification by our team.
auth.approvalNote: We'll email you as soon as your account is approved. You can then reserve a journey and pay online.

pay.heroSummary: Complete payment through Beyond Borders' hosted bank checkout.
pay.notEnabled: Payments are not enabled yet. The team can confirm this booking manually.
pay.expiredNote: This payment link has expired. Please request a fresh link.
pay.alreadyPaid: This booking is already marked paid.
pay.resultNotConfirmed: The bank did not confirm a captured payment. Please contact the team if this seems wrong.
pay.resultNotFound: We could not find this payment request.
pay.resultDisabled: Payments are disabled. This return page is ready for MPGS once credentials are enabled.

bookingPage.heroSummary: Begin your request for {title}. Our travel planners will refine every detail before confirmation.
bookingPage.signInPrompt: Please sign in or create an account to make a reservation.
bookingPage.awaitingVerification: Your account is awaiting verification. We'll email you as soon as it's approved — then you can book and pay online.
bookingPage.noInstantCheckoutPre: This journey isn't available for instant checkout yet. Please
bookingPage.step2: A planner confirms availability and package total.
bookingPage.step3: Beyond Borders shares secure payment instructions.
bookingPage.prepareNote: This page prepares a booking request only. No real payment is processed here.
bookingPage.specialRequestsPlaceholder: Tell us about room preferences, celebrations, accessibility needs or flight timing.
bookingPage.checkoutNote: You'll be taken to our bank's secure checkout to complete payment. No card details are stored by Beyond Borders.

aboutPage.heroLead: A Colombo-based travel house crafting private Sri Lanka journeys with polish, care and local fluency.
aboutPage.heading: Traveling. Tours. Adventure.
aboutPage.lead: Beyond Borders is a leading travel and tourism company in Sri Lanka, offering tailor-made travel packages to suit your passions, time, and budget.
aboutPage.para2: We understand the stress of planning that perfect holiday… whether you are looking for an idyllic break or a fun-filled adventure for the whole family. At Beyond Borders, our experts take care to listen to your needs and interests, and design a trip just for you.
aboutPage.para3: With wide experiences in the travel and tourism sector, our packages come at unbeatable value, as we help you make lasting memories.
aboutPage.noteText: Your journey is shaped by local planners, trusted guides and hotel partners across the island.

features.title: Tailor-Made Trips
features.text: Every trip is uniquely designed around your needs, pace, interests, and travel style.

features.title: Local Expertise
features.text: Our Colombo-based planners bring deep knowledge of Sri Lanka’s landscapes, culture, routes, and hidden gems.

features.title: Unbeatable Value
features.text: We curate premium travel experiences with trusted partners while keeping your journey practical and worthwhile.

features.title: End-to-End Support
features.text: From planning to final departure, our team stays reachable and supportive throughout your journey.

aboutPage.ctaTitle: Let the island open at your pace.
aboutPage.ctaText: Tell us how you like to travel, and a Beyond Borders planner will shape the first route around you.

destinationDetail.label: Destination
destinationDetail.ctaText: Share your travel dates and preferred pace, and we will connect this destination with the right hotels, guides and transfers.

contactPage.heroSummary: Share your dates, preferred pace and must-see places. A Beyond Borders planner will shape the first route.
contactPage.heading: Let us design your private Sri Lanka escape.
contactPage.lead: Share a few details and a Beyond Borders travel designer will shape the first version of your route.
contactPage.name: Name
contactPage.messagePlaceholder: Tell us your dates, travel style and must-see places.

customQuote.heroSummary: Tell us what you need — a package, hotel, air ticket or transport — and our team will reply with a tailored quote.

serverActions.waitMoment: Please wait a moment before submitting.
serverActions.enquiryNotConfigured: Enquiries are not configured yet. Please add Supabase environment variables.
serverActions.tooManyEnquiries: Too many recent enquiries from this connection. Please try again later.
serverActions.enquirySuccess: Thanks, {name}. A Beyond Borders planner will reply by email.
serverActions.enquiryError: We could not submit the enquiry. Please try again or email the team directly.
serverActions.bookingsNotConfigured: Bookings are not configured yet. Please add Supabase environment variables.
serverActions.journeyNotAvailable: This journey is not available for booking.
serverActions.noInstantCheckout: This journey isn't available for instant checkout. Please contact our team.
serverActions.bookingError: We could not start your booking. Please try again or contact the team directly.
serverActions.tooManyInquiries: Too many recent inquiries from this connection. Please try again later.
serverActions.inquirySuccess: Thank you. Your inquiry has been received — our team will reply by email.
serverActions.inquiryError: We could not submit your inquiry. Please try again or contact the team directly.
